holdings.infoBox: SEIE is an equity ETF with a total of 353 individual holdings. The top holdings are HSBC Holdings stock at 1.98%, Murata Manufacturing at 1.67%, ASML Holding at 1.50%, GSK plc at 1.20%, and ING Groep at 1.16%.

overview.description: The SEI Select International Equity ETF (SEIE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through investments in non-US companies from developed markets. The selection process integrates the advisers proprietary quantitative model with recommendations from one or more sub-advisers. SEIE was launched on Oct 10, 2024 and is issued by SEI.
